name: Redis RCE — SSH Authorized Keys Injection
description: Redis CONFIG SET dir targeting /root/.ssh or /home/*/.ssh, or CONFIG SET dbfilename authorized_keys — exploits Redis file persistence to inject an SSH public key for persistent backdoor access. Technique observed in strapi-plugin-cron / strapi-plugin-events supply-chain attack.

patterns.message: Redis RCE: CONFIG SET dir targets SSH directory — exploits Redis to inject authorized_keys for backdoor access.
Redis RCE: CONFIG SET dbfilename authorized_keys — injects SSH public key via Redis file write.
